ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully holding and presenting a tumbler glass.  The robot will use both arms to cradle the glass, conveying care and precision. Frame 1 will show the arms beginning to approach the glass.  Frame 2 will show the glass being gently lifted. Frame 3 will show the glass being held steadily at a comfortable height. Frame 4 will show the glass being lowered back down. Frame 5 will show the arms returning to a neutral position.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the delicate nature of handling the glass.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, ready to grasp
arms move closer, preparing to lift
arms carefully cradle the glass, holding steady
arms gently lower the glass back down
arms return to rest at the sides
